attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_CONTROL)

attributes.Sql Query:

FROM

(
select PROJ_AUTOMATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_CONTROL
minus
select PROJ_AUTOMATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_CONTROL
) ACM
where 
 ACM.PROJ_AUTOMATION_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_CONTROL.PROJ_AUTOMATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_CONTROL.REFRESH_DATETIME
